description: Perform colony counting and size classification on the microbiology plate image '~/Fiji_Data/raw/colonies/cell_colony.tif'. Detect dark colonies (size 20-Infinity px^2, circularity 0.3-1.0) and classify them by Area into Small (< 100 px^2), Medium (100 - 500 px^2), and Large (> 500 px^2). Save the measurements including Area, Circularity, Centroid (X, Y), and size_class to '~/Fiji_Data/results/colonies/colony_measurements.csv'. Generate a summary report with total and per-class counts at '~/Fiji_Data/results/colonies/colony_summary.txt' and a distribution table with columns for size_class, count, percentage, and mean_area at '~/Fiji_Data/results/colonies/size_distribution.csv'. Save an annotated image with colony overlays to '~/Fiji_Data/results/colonies/colony_overlay.png'.
